docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF OCTOBER 01, 2008.

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY MAYNOR A. RODAS ARDON SET FOR JUN-11-2009 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-10-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. CONTINUE IN 6 MONTH INTERVALS FOR A TOTAL OF 29 MONTHS PER ORDER OF AUGUST 7, 2008. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY MAYNOR A. RODAS ARDON SET FOR DEC-10-2009 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-10-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN 506.

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY MAYNOR A. RODAS ARDON SET FOR JUN-10-2010 IS CONTINUED PER ORDER OF AUGUST 7, 2008 FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-09-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED AS SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO THE PLAINTIFF YENDI A. ESTRADA, RETURNED "FORWARD TIME EXPIRED/RETURN TO SENDER".
REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-09-2010 IN DEPT. 506 - NO APPEARANCES, OFF CALENDAR, CASE WAS DISMISSED BY THE COURT. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2010. NO APPEARANCES. CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM MOTION OF DEC-09-2010 AT 1:30PM. PER 06-10-10 ORDER THAT CASE SETTLED. COMM. PAUL SALVIT, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, YENDI A. AS TO DEFENDANT RODAS ARDON, MAYNOR A.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-11-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODAS ARDON, MAYNOR A.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. JORGE RODAS INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, YENDI A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODAS ARDON, MAYNOR A. $2,881.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,966.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, YENDI A. AS TO DEFENDANT RODAS ARDON, MAYNOR A.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT RODAS ARDON, MAYNOR A. HEARING SET FOR AUG-07-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTF'S ANSWER TO DEFT'S REQUEST FOR TIME PAYMENT RECEIVED AND FILED.

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY MAYNOR A. RODAS ARDON SET FOR AUG-07-2008 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-11-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO INSTALLMENT PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE 6 MONTHS FOR PROGRESS REPORT, AND THEREAFTER IN 6 MONTH INTERVALS FOR A TOTAL OF 29 MONTHS. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT. COMMSSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RODAS ARDON, MAYNOR A.
REMOVED FROM EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF AUG. 01, 2008. MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENT HEARING ON DEC. 11, 2008.
REMOVED FROM EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF SEPTEMBER 2, 2008.

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY MAYNOR A. RODAS ARDON SET FOR DEC-11-2008 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-11-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE 6 MONTHS FOR PROGRESS REPORT PURSUANT TO ORDER OF 8/7/08. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES.
